key_facts: Verro Logistics reported third-quarter 2026 revenue of $18.4 million.
Verro Logistics reported second-quarter 2026 revenue of $15.1 million.
Verro Logistics reported third-quarter 2026 net income of $2.2 million.
Verro Logistics reported second-quarter 2026 net income of $1.9 million.
Verro Logistics opened three new depots during the third quarter of 2026.
Verro Logistics' depot network reached 27 locations in the third quarter of 2026.
